name: Domestic Violence Test
story: My husband has been physically and emotionally abusive for the past 2 years. On January 10, 2024, he threatened to kill me and threw a glass bottle at me which hit the wall near my head. I have medical records from the hospital visit on January 11 showing bruises on my arm and face. I have threatening WhatsApp messages from him sent on January 9 and 10. My neighbor witnessed the incident on January 10. I am in immediate danger and need urgent legal protection. I have filed a police complaint at the local police station but they have not taken action yet. I need a restraining order and police protection.
